title: HM Courts and Tribunals Service Board meeting 7 November 2024
body: "The meeting discussed items including:   Property Board Update Performance and finance updates Analysis of Variations in Regional Performance Reform Programme Benefits Position Next Steps on Productivity Decommissioning Legacy and Risk Mitigation Programme – Application and Maintenance Support Services Contract – Full Business Case Initial view of the implications of the Spending Review – allocations process and the latest position on the Spending Review Service Demand Forecast Complaints Update  "
